title: sorbus reducta var. reducta
intro: Sorbus reducta var. reducta, also known as the Chinese rowan or mountain ash, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to China. Its bark and leaves have been used in traditional Chinese medicine, possessing anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Sorbus reducta var. reducta include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be made from its bark, leaves, or flowers, but it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any medicinal plant.
